actionUnits.condition: Simulate a collider entering BoxCollider(id=1635398364, isTrigger=1) on Door 1 to invoke DoorAnimationEvent.OnTriggerEnter. MonoBehaviour(id=1635398365, guid=a8a2c5194e4c1f1458096e7bee47220e) matches script DoorAnimationEvent; Animator(id=1635398366) will receive Anim.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger").

Simulate the collider exiting BoxCollider(id=1635398364) to invoke DoorAnimationEvent.OnTriggerExit, which schedules closeDoors via Invoke after 0.5s; Animator receives Anim.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger") again to close.

Simulate a collider entering BoxCollider(id=353440280, isTrigger=1) on Door 2 to invoke DoorAnimationEvent.OnTriggerEnter and AudioTrigger.OnTriggerEnter. MonoBehaviour(id=353440281, guid=a8a2c5194e4c1f1458096e7bee47220e) matches script DoorAnimationEvent; MonoBehaviour(id=353440283, guid=3dc13bc17e982d54e848fac3441c08c4) matches script AudioTrigger. Animator(component id=353440282) will receive Anim.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger"); AudioTrigger will call audioSource.Play().

Simulate the collider exiting BoxCollider(id=353440280) to invoke DoorAnimationEvent.OnTriggerExit. Since isOpened is true after enter, it schedules closeDoors via Invoke after 0.5s; Animator receives Anim.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger") again to close.

To cover AudioTrigger.Update branch, set keysPlaced.numKeys to 3 on keyMainScript (referenced by keysPlaced: fileID=2046914207) so that audioSource.Stop() is executed. Requires external action on the referenced component; no public no-arg methods exposed on AudioTrigger to call directly.
